title: Selling Notion Templates for Crypto Explained for Digital Creators — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Kenya, passionate about Notion templates, but struggling to sell them due to PayPal and Stripe restrictions. You've tried reaching out to banks, only to be met with rejection. Your customers can't pay you, and you're left wondering if you'll ever get paid for your hard work. You're not alone – many creators face similar challenges. But there is a way to break free from these restrictions and start selling your Notion templates to a global audience. It starts with understanding how the technology works and how to harness it to your advantage.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

The technology behind selling digital products like Notion templates is based on blockchain and cryptocurrency. It's a decentralized system that allows for secure, peer-to-peer transactions without the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. This means that you can sell your templates directly to customers, without having to worry about restrictions or limitations. But what does this really mean for you as a creator? It means that you can reach a global audience, sell your templates at a higher price, and get paid instantly. It also means that you can reduce your reliance on traditional payment processors and their associated fees.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

When a customer buys your Notion template, they send cryptocurrency to your wallet address. The Core Shop Engine, a backend system, verifies the payment and automatically delivers the template to the customer. The customer receives a PDF receipt, and you get notified of the sale. The entire process is automated, eliminating the need for manual intervention or traditional payment processors. This not only saves you time but also reduces the risk of errors or disputes.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is built for digital creators like you, who want to sell their Notion templates to a global audience without the restrictions of traditional payment processors. It's perfect for creators who have been held back by PayPal or Stripe restrictions, or who want to reach new customers and increase their sales. By using this technology, you can break free from the limitations of traditional payment processors and take control of your sales process.
Don't let PayPal and Stripe restrictions hold you back from selling your Notion templates.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine is the backbone of this technology, providing the backend infrastructure for automated delivery and payment verification. The Web3 Wallet Connect is the frontend component, allowing customers to easily and securely send cryptocurrency to your wallet address. The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management, giving you a clear view of your sales and customer activity. Together, these components form a seamless and efficient sales process that gets you paid instantly.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the technology behind selling Notion templates, it's time to take action. Start by setting up your Core Shop Engine and Wallet Connect. Create your templates and set your prices. Market your products to your audience and wait for the sales to roll in. Remember, this technology is designed to be easy to use, so don't be afraid to experiment and try new things. With the right mindset and a little practice, you'll be selling your Notion templates like a pro in no time.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
The Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect make it easy to set up a seamless and efficient sales process.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in selling Notion templates, you might also be interested in selling other digital products like ebooks, courses, and software. Using the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect, you can create a digital product store that reaches a global audience and increases your sales. Additionally, you can explore other topics like blockchain and cryptocurrency, and learn how to harness their power to your advantage.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a concrete action plan to get you started: Set up your Core Shop Engine and Wallet Connect. Create high-quality Notion templates and set competitive prices. Market your products to your audience through social media, email marketing, and other channels. Test and optimize your sales process to maximize your results. Monitor your sales and customer activity using the Admin Dashboard. Continuously improve and refine your products and sales strategy to stay ahead in the market.
With the right mindset and a little practice, you can start selling your Notion templates like a pro in no time.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
